title: Classic Tools Fusion Compats
description: Classic Tools Fusion Compats adds Classic Tools Fusion-style textures to modded tools and weapons
body:
## 📦 Classic Tools Fusion Compats
**This resource pack** applies the **Classic Tools Fusion** style to **modded tools and weapons**

✅ **Compatible mods:**

[**Advanced Netherite**](https://modrinth.com/project/CFX9ftUJ)

[**Bronze**](https://modrinth.com/project/6pVlXMty)

**The mod you need compatibility for isn’t listed?** Leave a comment on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/classic-tools-fusion-compats/comments)
